## 2026-05-11 - Added keyboard focus to file upload controls
**Learning:** File upload drag-and-drop zones and file removal buttons generated by React components in this app lacked explicit keyboard focus indicators (focus-visible classes), creating a confusing experience for keyboard users trying to submit documents.
**Action:** Always ensure that any interactive element, especially custom divs and dynamically generated utility buttons, have explicit focus-visible styles to ensure full keyboard navigation support.

## 2026-06-18 - Replaced generic `div` and `label` wrappers with `fieldset` and `legend` for radio/checkbox groups
**Learning:** Radio and checkbox groups structured as generic divs with a visually associated text label lack semantic meaning for assistive technologies, preventing screen readers from understanding that the inputs belong to a single, related question or context.
**Action:** Always wrap radio button and checkbox groups in a `<fieldset>` element and use a `<legend>` for the group's title or main question. This explicitly links the question to its multiple choices, vastly improving screen reader comprehension.
